features: Gently moisturises baby skin all day long and helps sooth dry skin from the first use.
Made with 100 Percent skin-natural nutrients and helps delicate baby skin retain its natural moisture all day long.* *Our nutrients are identical to those naturally found in skin.
Dove baby lotion's gentle and safety-tested formula is dermatologist and paediatrician tested
Dove caring formula is created without parabens, phthalates, SLS or SLES
Mild and delicately fragranced, suitable for daily use
description: Product Description The best baby lotions should give the gentle, nourishing care their delicate developing skin needs. Bathing can lead to skin dryness, so use Baby Dove Rich Moisture Lotion afterwards to help replenish the essential moisture and nutrients in your baby’s skin. Made with 100 Percent skin - natural nutrients, Baby Dove Rich Moisture Lotion helps moisturise and replenish your baby’s precious skin barrier all day, leaving baby’s skin soft and delicately scented. From the very first use, this baby body lotion soothes and hydrates to help baby's skin retain its natural moisture. It is dermatologist and paediatrician tested so you can feel reassured that your baby’s skin is getting the extra special care it deserves. Plus, the gentle, hypoallergenic formula of baby moisturising lotion is suitable to use even on your newborn. formula is made without parabens or phthalates. Use Baby Dove Rich Moisture Lotion after bathing your baby with Baby Dove Rich Moisture Head to Toe Wash. Warm Baby Dove Rich Moisture Lotion in your hands, then apply to your baby’s skin and massage to moisturise your little one’s delicate skin while leaving it super soft. Looking for a baby lotion for extra sensitive skin? Try Baby Dove Sensitive Moisture Baby Lotion, which is fragrance free. And if you love baby lotions, please let us know by leaving a review! How to use: Warm Baby Dove Rich Moisture Lotion in your hands, apply it to your baby’s body and massage gently. Ideal for everyday use. External usage only Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Petrolatum, Stearic Acid, Glycol Stearate, Dimethicone, Isopropyl Isostearate, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Cetearyl Alcohol, Disodium EDTA, Glyceryl Stearate, Magnesium Aluminum Silicate, Parfum, Phenoxyethanol, Stearamide AMP, Tapioca Starch, Triethanolamine, Benzyl Alcohol, Citronellol, Limonene, CI 77891. Safety Warning External usage only. As we are always looking to improve our products, our formulations change from time to time, so please always check the product packaging before use See more
